Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d if 'gurdon' in k or 'malvern' in k or 'glenwood' in k or 'amity' in k]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\('--',k,'--'\) or [print\('Q:',x['q']\) for x in d[k]] for k in ['tree-service-gurdon-ar','tree-service-malvern-ar','tree-service-glenwood-ar','tree-service-amity-ar'] if k in d]")

Bash(node -e "const f=require\('./src/data/faq.json'\); console.log\('tree-removal count:', f['tree-removal'].length\); console.log\('tree-trimming count:', f['tree-trimming'].length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(f['tree-removal'],null,1\).slice\(0,400\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const inv=require\('./discovery/analysis/inventory.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(inv\); console.log\('top keys:', keys.slice\(0,5\)\); const tr=inv['tree-removal']||inv['/tree-removal']; const tt=inv['tree-trimming']||inv['/tree-trimming']; console.log\('TR:',JSON.stringify\(tr,null,1\)\); console.log\('TT:',JSON.stringify\(tt,null,1\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const inv=require\('./discovery/analysis/inventory.json'\); const arr=Array.isArray\(inv\)?inv:Object.values\(inv\); const find=\(s\)=>arr.find\(e=>e&&\(e.slug===s||e.path==='/'+s||e.path===s||e.url&&e.url.includes\('/'+s\)\)\); console.log\('keys of one:', Object.keys\(arr[0]\)\); console.log\('TR:', JSON.stringify\(find\('tree-removal'\),null,1\)\); console.log\('TT:', JSON.stringify\(find\('tree-trimming'\),null,1\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const arr=require\('./discovery/analysis/inventory.json'\); const p=\(k\)=>{const e=arr.find\(x=>x.page===k\); console.log\('=== '+k+' ==='\); console.log\('title:',e.title\); console.log\('meta:',e.meta_desc\); console.log\('h1:',e.h1\); console.log\('internal_links:',JSON.stringify\(e.internal_links\)\);}; p\('tree-removal'\); p\('tree-trimming'\);")

Bash(node -e "const f=require\('./src/data/faq.json'\); console.log\('TR ans grep 77/70:'\); f['tree-removal'].forEach\(x=>{if\(/7[07]|review|comparison/i.test\(x.a\)\)console.log\(' ',x.q,'=>',x.a.match\(/7[07] reviews|comparison\\S*/gi\)\);}\); console.log\('TT:'\); f['tree-trimming'].forEach\(x=>{if\(/7[07]|comparison/i.test\(x.a\)\)console.log\(' ',x.q\);}\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.keys\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('inventory.json'\)\); print\(type\(d\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('emergency-tree-service-arkadelphia-ar', d if not isinstance\(d,dict\) else 'KEY MISSING'\), indent=2\)[:500]\)")

Bash(node -e "const i=require\('./discovery/analysis/inventory.json'\); console.log\('TOP TYPE:', Array.isArray\(i\)?'array':'object'\); console.log\('KEYS:', Object.keys\(i\).slice\(0,8\)\); if\(Array.isArray\(i\)\){console.log\(JSON.stringify\(i[0],null,2\)\)}")

Bash(node -e "const a=require\('./discovery/analysis/inventory.json'\); ['dead-tree-removal-arkadelphia-ar','stump-grinding-arkadelphia-ar','tree-trimming-arkadelphia-ar'].forEach\(p=>{const e=a.find\(x=>x.page===p\); console.log\('==',p,'=='\); if\(e\){console.log\('title:',e.title\); console.log\('meta:',e.meta_desc\); console.log\('h1:',JSON.stringify\(e.h1\)\);} else console.log\('NOT FOUND'\);}\)")
